name: 7-Zip
description: Compressore e estrattore di archivi open source
description_en: Open source archive compressor and extractor

name: WinRAR
description: Gestore di archivi con supporto RAR nativo
description_en: Archive manager with native RAR support

name: PeaZip
description: Gestore di archivi gratuito e open source
description_en: Free and open source archive manager

name: Bandizip
description: Archiviatore veloce con supporto multiformato
description_en: Fast archiver with multi-format support

name: NanaZip
description: Fork moderno di 7-Zip ottimizzato per Windows 11
description_en: Modern 7-Zip fork optimized for Windows 11

name: Everything
description: Motore di ricerca file istantaneo per Windows
description_en: Instant file search engine for Windows

name: Listary
description: Utilità di ricerca e avvio rapido per Windows
description_en: Search and quick launch utility for Windows

name: Wox
description: Launcher completo per Windows simile a Alfred
description_en: Full-featured Windows launcher similar to Alfred

name: Microsoft PowerToys
description: Raccolta di utilità avanzate per utenti esperti Windows
description_en: Collection of advanced utilities for Windows power users

name: AutoHotkey
description: Linguaggio di scripting per automazione desktop
description_en: Scripting language for desktop automation

name: Ditto
description: Gestore appunti avanzato con cronologia clipboard
description_en: Advanced clipboard manager with clipboard history

name: Greenshot
description: Strumento di cattura schermo leggero e gratuito
description_en: Lightweight and free screen capture tool

name: Flameshot
description: Strumento di screenshot potente e personalizzabile
description_en: Powerful and customizable screenshot tool

name: ShareX
description: Strumento avanzato per cattura schermo e condivisione
description_en: Advanced screen capture and sharing tool

name: TreeSize Free
description: Analizzatore spazio disco con visualizzazione ad albero
description_en: Disk space analyzer with tree view visualization

name: WinDirStat
description: Visualizzatore di utilizzo disco con mappa grafica
description_en: Disk usage viewer with graphical map

name: Bulk Rename Utility
description: Rinominatore di file in massa potente e gratuito
detectPaths: C:/Program Files/Bulk Rename Utility/Bulk Rename Utility.exe
description_en: Powerful and free bulk file renamer

name: Advanced Renamer
description: Strumento avanzato per rinominare file in batch
description_en: Advanced tool for batch file renaming

name: Revo Uninstaller
description: Disinstallatore avanzato con pulizia residui
description_en: Advanced uninstaller with residue cleanup

name: IObit Uninstaller
description: Disinstallatore con rimozione completa dei programmi
description_en: Uninstaller with complete program removal

name: Geek Uninstaller
description: Disinstallatore leggero e portatile
description_en: Lightweight and portable uninstaller

name: CCleaner
description: Strumento di pulizia e ottimizzazione del sistema
description_en: System cleaning and optimization tool

name: BleachBit
description: Pulitore di sistema open source per liberare spazio
description_en: Open source system cleaner for freeing space

name: Glary Utilities
description: Suite completa di ottimizzazione e manutenzione sistema
description_en: Complete system optimization and maintenance suite

name: Wise Disk Cleaner
description: Pulitore disco con deframmentazione integrata
description_en: Disk cleaner with integrated defragmentation

name: Recuva
description: Strumento di recupero file cancellati
description_en: Deleted file recovery tool

name: TestDisk
description: Strumento di recupero dati e riparazione partizioni
description_en: Data recovery and partition repair tool

name: EaseUS Partition Master
description: Gestore partizioni disco con interfaccia grafica
detectPaths: C:/Program Files (x86)/EaseUS/EaseUS Partition Master/bin/EaseUS Partition Master.exe
description_en: Disk partition manager with graphical interface

name: MiniTool Partition Wizard
description: Gestore partizioni gratuito con funzioni avanzate
description_en: Free partition manager with advanced features

name: Rufus
description: Creatore di unità USB avviabili veloce e affidabile
description_en: Fast and reliable bootable USB creator

name: balenaEtcher
description: Strumento per flashare immagini OS su schede SD e USB
description_en: Tool for flashing OS images to SD cards and USB

name: Ventoy
description: Strumento per creare USB multiboot senza formattazione
description_en: Tool for creating multiboot USB without formatting

name: UltraISO (Trial)
description: Editor e creatore di immagini ISO professionale
description_en: Professional ISO image editor and creator

name: PowerISO (Trial)
description: Strumento completo per gestione immagini disco
description_en: Complete tool for disk image management

name: ImgBurn
description: Masterizzatore di immagini disco leggero e versatile
description_en: Lightweight and versatile disc image burner

name: Virtual CloneDrive
description: Lettore virtuale di immagini disco gratuito
description_en: Free virtual disc image reader

name: HashCheck
description: Estensione shell per il calcolo e la verifica di hash
description_en: Shell extension for hash calculation and verification

name: QuickHash GUI
description: Strumento di hashing file con interfaccia grafica
description_en: File hashing tool with graphical interface

name: Sysinternals Suite
description: Raccolta completa di utilità di sistema Microsoft
description_en: Microsoft's complete collection of system utilities

name: Process Explorer
description: Gestore processi avanzato di Microsoft Sysinternals
description_en: Advanced process manager from Microsoft Sysinternals

name: Autoruns
description: Gestore completo dei programmi di avvio automatico
description_en: Complete manager of auto-startup programs

name: Keypirinha
description: Launcher semantico veloce per Windows
description_en: Fast semantic launcher for Windows

name: Flow Launcher
description: Launcher rapido e ricercatore di file open source
description_en: Fast open source file and app launcher for Windows

name: Rainmeter
description: Piattaforma di personalizzazione desktop con widget
description_en: Desktop customization platform with widgets

name: Wallpaper Engine
description: Sfondi animati e interattivi per il desktop (Steam)
description_en: Animated and interactive desktop wallpapers (Steam)

name: f.lux
description: Regolatore automatico della temperatura colore dello schermo
description_en: Automatic screen color temperature adjuster

name: EarTrumpet
description: Controllo volume avanzato per singole applicazioni
description_en: Advanced per-application volume control

name: Files App
description: File manager moderno con interfaccia a schede per Windows
description_en: Modern file manager with tabbed interface for Windows

name: Directory Opus (Trial)
description: File manager professionale con doppio pannello
description_en: Professional dual-panel file manager

name: TeraCopy
description: Copia file veloce con verifica e ripresa trasferimenti
description_en: Fast file copy with verification and transfer resume
